scenario: Admin Holiday team visit for Fred Meyer InHouse NonBillable Admin (project 147, store 999)
notes: HAR recorder did not capture POST request body (empty postData). Body reconstructed from Angular AddNewTeamSchedulingModalController in bundled JS and confirmed live API 2026-07-04.
broker_company_id is the customer account NAME (Fred Meyer), not broker_company integer 2. Sending broker_company: 2 still fails with 'No account found for broker company id None'.
Kompass ISE (project 1) visits do not require broker_company_id. Project 147 / program 92 admin visits do.
Do not attach roster to an unrelated in-progress visit — create a dedicated visit shell first.
PTO single-employee flow (team 989886) is documented in sas-prod-pto-shift-har; multi-person Holiday roster uses this skill.
